commit_scope: Make Transmission Recipes examples open as prefilled composer cards.

commands: curl -sS --max-time 5 https://pulse.coherencycoin.com/pulse/now | jq '{overall, silences: (.ongoing_silences | length), silent_organs: [.organs[] | select(.status != "breathing") | .name]}'
Browser check: /vision/recipes desktop opens payload and pairing cards into composer
Browser check: /vision/recipes mobile field-kit actions visible with no main-content overflow
local_validation.summary: Pulse, prompt guide, wellness, index check, evidence validation, diff whitespace check, npm ci, production build, desktop/mobile browser checks, and local API/web contract passed. The first local web contract run hit a transient unrelated automation_usage timing threshold at 1080.75ms > 1000ms; rerun passed with automation_usage at 19.68ms and no failures.

commands: Browser check: https://coherencycoin.com/vision/recipes opens prefilled field-kit cards after deploy

phase_gate.reason: Local validation, CI, and public route validation remain pending until proof and PR flow complete.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: Visitors can open each public payload and novel pairing as a full editable recipe card, then use the existing restore and share-link flow.
test_flows: Desktop browser check clicks a payload card action and verifies composer fields are restored from the encoded recipe URL.
Desktop browser check clicks a novel pairing card action and verifies its grounded payload, proof, and boundary appear in the composer.
Mobile browser check confirms card actions remain visible without main-content overflow.
Production build confirms the route compiles.
